query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR ', ') as all_cols FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'game_quest_skill_catalog';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR ', ') as all_cols FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'game_quest_skill_catalog';
